apps.name: Visual Studio Code
install_methods: Manual install from official website or package manager
config_notes: Install only the extensions you need for the selected workflow.
risk_notes: Too many extensions can slow startup or conflict with each other.

apps.name: Git
install_methods: Manual install from official website or package manager
config_notes: Configure user name, email, credential manager, and default branch policy.
risk_notes: Only clone repositories you trust and review scripts before running them.

apps.name: Python
install_methods: Manual install from official website, Microsoft Store, pyenv, or package manager
apps.description: Python runtime for development and automation.
config_notes: Use virtual environments per project to avoid dependency conflicts.
risk_notes: Avoid installing packages globally unless you understand the impact.

apps.name: Node.js
install_methods: Manual install from official website, nvm, fnm, or package manager
apps.description: JavaScript runtime for frontend and tooling workflows.
config_notes: Prefer an LTS release for starter environments.
risk_notes: Project dependency scripts should be reviewed before execution.

apps.name: pnpm
install_methods: Manual install using official pnpm instructions
config_notes: Enable Corepack if your Node.js workflow uses it.
risk_notes: Lockfiles should be committed for reproducible installs.

apps.name: Docker Desktop
install_methods: Manual install from Docker official website
apps.description: Container runtime and desktop management UI.
config_notes: Allocate conservative CPU, RAM, and disk limits on smaller PCs.
risk_notes: Containers consume disk and memory; review images before running them.

apps.name: WSL2 Ubuntu
install_methods: Manual setup using official Microsoft WSL documentation
apps.description: Ubuntu Linux environment on Windows through WSL2.
config_notes: Use WSL2 for Linux-native developer tooling when needed.
risk_notes: WSL setup changes Windows optional features and should be reviewed manually.

apps.name: Cursor
install_methods: Manual install from official website
config_notes: Configure model provider, privacy settings, and repository indexing intentionally.
risk_notes: Review privacy and data-sharing settings before use.

apps.name: Codex CLI
install_methods: Manual install using official documentation
config_notes: Use project-level instructions and review generated diffs.
risk_notes: Do not run generated commands blindly.

apps.name: Continue
install_methods: Manual install from official extension marketplace or website
config_notes: Configure model endpoints and repository context carefully.
risk_notes: Review what code context is sent to external services.

apps.name: GitHub Copilot
install_methods: Manual install from official editor extension marketplace
config_notes: Review organization policy and editor settings.
risk_notes: Generated code must be reviewed and tested.

apps.name: ComfyUI
install_methods: Manual install from official repository instructions
apps.description: Node-based local AI image generation workflow tool.
config_notes: Keep models on an SSD and separate Python environments per AI tool.
risk_notes: Large model files consume significant disk space and VRAM.

apps.name: Ollama
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Local model runner for supported LLMs.
config_notes: Start with smaller models on systems with limited RAM or VRAM.
risk_notes: Model files can be large and may run slowly on low-memory machines.

apps.name: LM Studio
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Desktop application for local LLM experimentation.
config_notes: Choose quantized models that fit available RAM and VRAM.
risk_notes: Large models can make the system unresponsive on underpowered PCs.

apps.name: FFmpeg
install_methods: Manual install from official builds or package manager
config_notes: Keep FFmpeg on PATH only if required by your workflow.
risk_notes: Complex command lines can overwrite files if used carelessly.

apps.name: Prism Launcher
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Minecraft launcher with instance and modpack management.
config_notes: Use separate instances for shader, modded, and vanilla profiles.
risk_notes: Only install mods from trusted sources.

apps.name: Fabric
install_methods: Manual setup through Fabric official installer or launcher integration
config_notes: Match Fabric loader and mod versions to the Minecraft version.
risk_notes: Version mismatch can prevent Minecraft from launching.

apps.name: Iris Shaders
install_methods: Manual install from official source or mod platform
config_notes: Pair with Sodium for performance.
risk_notes: Shader presets can heavily impact frame rate.

apps.name: Sodium
install_methods: Manual install from Modrinth or official project page
config_notes: Use as a base for performance-sensitive shader setups.
risk_notes: Check compatibility with other rendering mods.

apps.name: Lithium
install_methods: Manual install from Modrinth or official project page
config_notes: Keep mod versions aligned with your loader version.
risk_notes: Server and client mod compatibility should be checked.

apps.name: FerriteCore
install_methods: Manual install from Modrinth or official project page
config_notes: Useful when running large modpacks on limited RAM.
risk_notes: Check compatibility notes for each Minecraft version.

apps.name: Distant Horizons
install_methods: Manual install from Modrinth or official project page
config_notes: Increase settings gradually and watch memory use.
risk_notes: High settings can consume substantial CPU, RAM, disk, and GPU resources.

apps.name: Modrinth App
install_methods: Manual install from official website
config_notes: Use separate profiles for experiments.
risk_notes: Review mod permissions and sources.

apps.name: Steam
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: PC game store and library client.
config_notes: Place large game libraries on a disk with enough free space.
risk_notes: Downloads and shader caches can consume significant disk space.

apps.name: Epic Games Launcher
install_methods: Manual install from official website
config_notes: Choose library locations intentionally.
risk_notes: Background launchers can consume startup resources.

apps.name: NVIDIA App
install_methods: Manual install from NVIDIA official website
apps.description: NVIDIA driver and settings companion app.
config_notes: Use official driver channels and avoid unnecessary overlays.
risk_notes: Driver updates should be reviewed for your hardware and games.

apps.name: MSI Afterburner
install_methods: Manual install from official MSI source
config_notes: Use monitoring features first; avoid overclocking unless experienced.
risk_notes: Incorrect tuning can reduce stability.

apps.name: CapFrameX
install_methods: Manual install from official website
config_notes: Use for repeatable benchmark comparisons.
risk_notes: Benchmark overlays can affect measurements if configured poorly.

apps.name: Discord
install_methods: Manual install from official website
config_notes: Disable unnecessary startup and overlay options if performance is a concern.
risk_notes: Overlays and background activity can affect game performance.

apps.name: OBS Studio
install_methods: Manual install from official website
config_notes: Use hardware encoding when available and test bitrates before recording important work.
risk_notes: High-resolution recording can consume disk and GPU resources quickly.

apps.name: DaVinci Resolve
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Video editing and color grading application.
config_notes: Place media cache on a fast disk with sufficient free space.
risk_notes: Low-RAM systems may struggle with high-resolution timelines.

apps.name: Audacity
install_methods: Manual install from official website
config_notes: Set project sample rates intentionally for your workflow.
risk_notes: Always keep source audio backups before destructive edits.

apps.name: CapCut / Jianying
install_methods: Manual install from official source
apps.description: Video editing application for quick creator workflows.
config_notes: Review export settings and cloud features before use.
risk_notes: Cloud and account features may have privacy implications.
